fields.description: The Tree Column whose owner fills this stage. Ordering is by the row idx (Frappe child-table sequence): left->right fill order.
fields.label: Column

fields.description: Per-transition SLA in seconds; 0 means no SLA (this stage never breaches).
fields.label: SLA Seconds

fields.description: Notify the stage's resolved owner when a run enters this stage.
fields.label: Notify On Enter
